message:
test: add ~120 tests across widgets, render, runtime, layout

bd-10i.11: Comprehensive test coverage expansion targeting
under-tested modules across the workspace.

Widget tests (78 new):
- borders.rs: all 5 border set variants, bitflags operations
- paragraph.rs: right alignment, word/char wrap, scroll, clipping
- lib.rs: apply_style, set_style_area, draw_text_span helpers
- cached.rs: cache key strategies, lifecycle, content verification
- block.rs: border types, title alignment, edge cases
- list.rs: markers, scroll, selection, viewport overflow
- scrollbar.rs: orientations, custom symbols, state defaults

Render tests (45 new):
- grapheme_pool.rs: 10 property tests for intern/refcount invariants
- link_registry.rs: 13 edge cases + 6 property tests
- frame.rs: 16 tests for hit testing, cursor, HitGrid

Layout tests (16 new):
- Constraint edge cases: min/max/ratio/percentage/gap/margin
- Direction symmetry, stress test with many constraints

Runtime tests (8 new):
- log_sink.rs: multi-line, invalid UTF-8, sanitization, drop semantics

All 1,478 workspace tests pass. Format and clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
